title: Torah as more punctiliar set of prescribed practicum/actions to get a result, get to a heaven/heavenly destination
body:
Leviticus 14:32
LEB This is the regulation/TORAH of the one on whom is an infectious skin disease who cannot afford the cost for his cleansing.”
HB2 14:32 זֹאת תּוֹרַת אֲשֶׁר־בּוֹ נֶגַע צָרָעַת אֲשֶׁר לֹא־תַשִּׂיג יָדוֹ בְּטָהֳרָתוֹ:

Circa Messiah torahing gentiles, giving Torah to the gentiles: 

- verse in Isaiah
